Term Sheet — Proposed Share Acquisition between Bayani Capital Holdings, Inc. (buyer) and Balangay Retail Ventures Corp. (target) under Philippine law.
Transaction structure: acquisition of up to a controlling stake through a negotiated sale from existing shareholders; consideration mix to be determined, no public offer at this stage.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed; target signing window on or before 28 Aug 2025, subject to board approvals.
Regulatory: filings under the SRC with the SEC; Form 17-C and PSE Edge disclosure to be prepared; PCC notification if HHI thresholds under PCC Rules are met.
Embargo: internal embargo on external communications until 15 Aug 2025 10:00 PHST or earlier upon posting of a 17-C on PSE Edge.
Conditions precedent: buyer financing confirmation, no injunctions, and no Material Adverse Change; for avoidance of doubt, changes in general Philippine economic conditions or PFRS updates shall not alone constitute a MAC.
Closing mechanics: escrow with BayanBank Test Branch (acct: 00-000-TEST-ABC), release against transfer confirmation by the target’s stock transfer agent and updated GIS filings.
Board approvals: resolutions of both parties’ boards and, if required, shareholders under the Revised Corporation Code; template board memo is available in the shared drive.
Public references: see PSE Edge disclosure dated 02 Jan 2024 on Balangay’s strategic review (public) and SEC MC No. 5-2020 guidance on electronic filings (public).
Tax and HR: no immediate changes to headcount or compensation are planned post-closing; any rationalization will comply with the Labor Code and BIR revenue regulations.
IR holding statement (draft, not for release until embargo lifts): the parties intend to maintain service levels and store footprint while evaluating synergies over 12 months.
Project management notes: draft 17-C and press lines in lowercase, update issues log, align data room folder names, and schedule dry run for board presentation.
Miscellaneous: governing law is the Republic of the Philippines; dispute resolution by arbitration in Metro Manila under the Metro Manila Arbitration Forum Rules.
Negative assurance: this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and costs; no solicitation of employees and no shop until 30 Sep 2025.
Identifiers and forms: draft cover to state SEC Reg. Nos. CS2010-12345X (buyer) and CS2005-67890Z (target), BIR TIN placeholders 000-000-000-AAA only, and PSE ref no. E-2025-00XYZ for filing templates.
Wellness reminder unrelated to the deal: spa-day vouchers for wellness week may be booked via hr@balangay-retail.example; this has no bearing on MAC or closing.
